content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(8, 9, 2), (0, 8, 6), (5, 9, 6), (4, 6, 7), (0, 9, 8), (1, 5, 8), (1, 3, 9), (2, 5, 12), (7, 8, 12), (1, 6, 13), (6, 9, 13), (7, 9, 17), (0, 4, 19), (5, 8, 19)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 2 exactly at time 12.

First, we will go through each edge and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node:

* Edge (8, 9, 2) has node 9 and time 2. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 8, 6) has node 8 and time 6. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (5, 9, 6) has node 9 and time 6. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 6, 7) has node 6 and time 7. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (0, 9, 8) has node 9 and time 8. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (1, 5, 8) has node 5 and time 8. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (1, 3, 9) has node 3 and time 9. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (2, 5, 12) has node 5 and time 12. -> Add node 2.
* Edge (7, 8, 12) has node 8 and time 12. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (1, 6, 13) has node 6 and time 13. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (6, 9, 13) has node 9 and time 13. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (7, 9, 17) has node 9 and time 17. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 4, 19) has node 4 and time 19. -> Add node 0.
* Edge (5, 8, 19) has node 8 and time 19. -> Add node 5.

Now we have the following nodes linked with node 2 at time 12:
[2, 5, 7, 8, 9]

Answer: [2, 5, 7, 8, 9]
